titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Yaqtin
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ali Ibn Yaqtin

segments: ه عن عليّ بن يقطين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن يقطين، عن أخيه الحسين عن أبيه عليّ بن يقطين‌.
arabic.text: ه عن عليّ بن يقطين فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن يقطين، عن أخيه الحسين عن أبيه عليّ بن يقطين‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Yaqtin has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin, from his brother Al-Husayn, from their father Ali ibn Yaqtin.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ali ibn Yaqtin has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn 'Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Yaqtin, from his brother Al-Husayn, from their father Ali ibn Yaqtin.
